//: Claude Code hooks. Auto-regenerates the workbook + brochure whenever a trip.json is written, and reminds the engine to run conflict checks. Place under .claude/ or merge into your settings.json 'hooks' block.

hooks.description: If a trip.json changed, rebuild outputs (xlsx + brochure).

hooks.command: grep -qiE 'trip|itinerary|vacation|brochure|plan .* (days|trip)' <<< "$CLAUDE_USER_PROMPT" && echo '[hint] trip-planner skill is available (deterministic engine, 0-token core).' || true
hooks.description: Nudge the planner skill when the prompt looks travel-related.
